leadText: Stone Edge (Japanese: ストーンエッジ Stone Edge) is a damage-dealing Rock-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM71 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TR75 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM150 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM065 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, it can be upgraded to the special Z-Move Splintered Stormshards by Lycanroc holding Lycanium Z.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Legends: Arceus 1.2 Generation IX 1.2.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Stone Edge deals damage and has an increased critical hit ratio. Stone Edge can also be used as part of a Contest Spectacular combination , with the user gaining extra three appeal points if the move Focus Energy was used in the prior turn. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Physical PP 5 Agile Strong Power 100 80 120 Accuracy 80% 80% 90% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Crit. stage +1 +1 +2 ? ? ? ? Has a high critical-hit ratio Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Stone Edge's projectiles erupt from the ground. If an intended target(s) is too high in the air, Stone Edge will not make contact. Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 100 120 Cooldown 10s Move wind-up time 15 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect — — — None

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone. It has a high critical-hit ratio. (move) The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone from below. It has a high critical-hit ratio. (TM) PBR The user stabs the foe with a sharpened stone. It has a high critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 The user stabs the foe with sharpened stones from below. It has a high critical-hit ratio. X Y OR AS The user stabs the target with sharpened stones from below. Critical hits land more easily. S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP The user stabs the target from below with sharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily. LA S V The user stabs the target with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit. ZA The user attacks by stabbing targets with sharpened stones. This move has a heightened chance of landing a critical hit.
